contentPattern.structure: media (image or video) background + overlaid heading + LEARN MORE link
contentPattern.layout: rows of two with alternating 2/3 + 1/3 width

suitableFor: product / category touts with media backgrounds and overlaid headings
dark-themed promotional card grids with alternating column emphasis
notSuitableFor: simple light-themed cards with image + body text below (use base cards)
